title: Expanded World
description: Expanded World enhances your Minecraft experience by extending the world height, introducing custom caves, structures, and vegetation. Explore new depths and heights in your Minecraft worlds with this mod/datapack!
body:
## Notice

Please be advised that there is currently an issue affecting ore generation across all versions, resulting in fewer ores than intended. A fix is actively being worked on and will be implemented as soon as possible. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

# Expanded World Mod/Datapack

<details>
  <summary>Compatibility</summary>

  ### not compatible with 
  
  - Terralith
</details>

## Description
Expanded World is a Minecraft Mod and Datapack that extends the world's vertical limit from 384 to 640 blocks (-128 to 512) and introduces bespoke cave systems across multiple biomes. Alongside, it integrates custom vanilla-style structures and enhances the game's generation and vegetation mechanics.

## Installation
### Datapack Installation
Installing the datapack follows the standard procedure. Prior to installation or updating, it's advisable to create backups of your worlds.

### Mod Installation
Expanded World can also function as a mod for Forge, NeoForge, and Fabric. Refer to the specific installation guidelines provided for each respective mod loader.

## Features
- Elevates the world height to a minimum of Y: -128 and maximum of Y: 512
- Introduces tailored cave systems across various biomes, including ice, snow, desert, jungle, swamp, and badlands
- Augments vegetation in swamp and birch forests, and introduces fallen trees within forests and taigas
- Expands vanilla village and pillager outpost placements across diverse biomes
- Introduces new village variants in badlands, swamp, dark forest, and jungle
- Adds a novel structure: small camps featuring tents and campfires
